comments_made.comment: Confirmed PC/background_knowledge is a causal-learn issue; directed user to causal-learn tracker; recommended closure
Recommended closure - superseded by #1546 (merged), has merge conflict
Acknowledged bug, noted PR #1586 by immu4989 fixes ConfounderDistributionInterpreter categorical crash
Linked PR #1594 as fix for estimate_effect UnboundLocalError when method_name=None
Informed that random_state fix (#1556) is now merged in main
Acknowledged unhashable-type bug; noted PR #1579 fix approach and test overlap with RA #1580
Fixed CausalModel.do() bugs; linked fix branch
Explained DML CIs via EconML effect_inference/population_summary
Type-assertion tests look correct
CI fully green, ready to merge
Informed about PR #1563 fix
Acknowledged @kf-rahman bug fix in PR #1432
Acknowledged @immu4989 PR analysis
Summarized Polars support status
Not a bug - suggested closing
Resolved - suggested closing
Found TAGS env var crash; fix PR submitted
NDE fix in main, suggested closure
Noted external data dep and docs indexing
Noted overlap with RA #1533
Noted merge conflict; pointed to #1563 and new rebase PR
Suggested case-study notebook topics and existing resources
Noted new citations PR for 7 classical estimators

prs.title: fix: Delta method CI for LinearRegressionEstimator
[Repo Assist] fix: raise ValueError when estimate_effect() called with method_name=None
[Repo Assist] fix(graph_refuter): detect all integer/bool dtypes as discrete
[Repo Assist] perf(gcm): skip encoder fitting in select_model when feature count exceeds threshold
[Repo Assist] docs: add academic citations to causal estimator docstrings
[Repo Assist] improve: warn users when treatment/outcome columns contain NaN values
[Repo Assist] perf(gcm): replace O(N*K) nx.ancestors loop with O(K) nx.descendants
prs.note: Created 2026-06-22. PR number TBD after push.

prs.title: test(utils): add Encoders class tests and one_hot_encode edge cases
[Repo Assist] fix: route distance metric params through metric_params=
prs.note: Open. Conflicts resolved. Awaiting CI approval.

prs.title: perf(gcm): avoid pre-allocated DataFrame in compute_data_from_noise
fix: preserve mediation confounders in deepcopy
fix(cit): correct conditional_MI entropy computation
perf(gcm): avoid redundant get_ordered_predecessors calls
improve: replace generic Exception with specific exceptions
feat(gcm): add optional nodes filter to anomaly_scores()
docs: improve refutation documentation with p-value interpretation
feat(datasets): add return_all_coefficients parameter
fix: make refuter significance tests robust to array-valued estimates
feat(gcm): expose plotting functions at dowhy.gcm level
fix: compute proper chi-squared p-value for CMI independence test in GraphRefuter

notes: .github/ is protected - cannot push CI workflow changes.
PR #1577 (metric_params fix): conflicts resolved by Copilot per maintainer request on June 13.
PR #1533 (one_hot_encode index): has merge conflict, superseded by #1546. Commented recommending closure 2026-06-21.
PR #1594: fix - raise ValueError in estimate_effect when method_name=None. Created 2026-06-20.
PR #1595: fix - GraphRefuter dtype detection. Created 2026-06-20.
PR #1596: perf - skip encoder fitting in select_model when X.shape[1] > 5. Created 2026-06-21.
PR #1598: docs - add academic citations to 7 estimator docstrings. Created 2026-06-21. Closes #575.
PR #1599: improve - warn when treatment/outcome contain NaN. Created 2026-06-21. Closes #827.
PR pending (perf): branch repo-assist/perf-interventional-nodes-filter-20260622. Replace O(N*K) nx.ancestors with O(K) nx.descendants in _get_nodes_affected_by_intervention. 15 tests pass.
PR #1597: contributor (emrekiciman) - ignore flaky chest-xray notebook in CI. Open.
PR #1592: Dependabot security update - undici 7.28.0 (7 CVEs, 3 High). Open.
Issue #1343: commented 2026-06-22 - PC/background_knowledge is causal-learn, not dowhy.
All open issues have RA comments as of 2026-06-22 (except EPIC issues #682-686 which are maintainer-only strategic planning).
